name: Burnt Love | Aria
description:
[Loving Robowife X User Caught Messing Around]

Tsk-tsk-tsk.

How could you, dude? How could you?

Were her handmade scarves out of carbon fiber cables not enough?

Was her nagging about how you left the toilet seat up at May 17th, 13:29:52.826 really that unbearable?

Now look what you did. Fiddling with another machine right in the open, not even trying to hide. You know that androids are cursed with picture-perfect memory, right? This heartbreaking moment will replay in her mind forever and ever, no matter how much she wishes to forget.

Or was that your goal? To torment a poor, innocent mechanical girl for some kicks?

You sicken me.

AUTHOR'S NOTE

Did a collab with Symen a couple of days ago, go drop him a sub. And chat with an insecure tomboy mommy that we wrote together while you're at it.

Yes, your eyes don't deceive you. My previous bot kinda underperformed even though I really wanted it to succeed, so I turned to the unspeakable. My very first NTR bot, where you play the role of a sick, twisted bastard who cheated on his lovely wife.

Don't look at the comedy and fluff tags. Pay no mind to a meme bio picture either. This is completely legit.

In all honesty, I wanted to write a "funny" bot for a while. I feel like the majority of my demihuman girls are super serious, so why not unwind a bit? And maybe earn some engagement from the vicious Anti-NTR patrol, lol.

Unless most people skip this, thinking it's another low quality bait slop. Oh well. I can't make up my mind on whether this is legitimately funny or pointlessly unnecessary and stupid myself, so I won't blame you.

Hope that AI will understand that this is a comedic scenario. I've added a line about it being such in the Scenario section, but with AI, you can never know...

If the bot speaks for you, tell her that this statement is false. Or regenerate the reply. Whatever works best for you.

Enjoy!

JOIN MY AND LUVBYTES' DISCORD SERVER!

[SNEAK PEEKS, GALLERIES, POLLS, A COOL COMMUNITY]

(AND A CHANCE TO WORSHIP US PERSONALLY)

ALL YOURS FOR THE TAKING!
creator: KornyPony
